race.comment: TAVROS (1) settled next to last then unleashed powerfully to win impressively over 1700m at Scone (metro) nine days ago. Draws a single-figure gate for the first time this prep. Can settle a couple of pairs closer this time and despite a big weight should be too strong for this field. DELRICO (9) last appeared on 22 April when he found the line well to be beaten under two lengths over 2060m at Doomben. Racing well without looking a winner of late. Should be thereabouts regardless of the 32-day gap between runs. SONOFDEC (4) travelled at the tail of a small field and had trouble accelerating under a big weight over 1400m at Kembla recently. Goes well third-up and getting out to the mile is a big help. SMOKE ON THE WATER (12) won a BM58 over 1500m at Muswellbrook last start in a form reversal. Tougher this time but he is an each-way hope down in the weights. GREEN RUN (8) backs up a week after a fair effort in the 1600m Parkes Cup. One for the exotics.
